description_long: This is a large, industrial-style metal dumpster with a rectangular body and a flat, hinged lid that appears slightly dented and weathered. The lid has a small circular hole and is divided into two sections, with one side propped open by a slanted metal flap. The exterior is primarily gray with visible signs of rust, wear, and grime, indicating prolonged outdoor use. There are several warning and information labels, including red and yellow stickers, as well as faded text and symbols. The dumpster is mounted on four small wheels for mobility, and reinforced metal bars and brackets are visible along the base and sides. Handles are present on the sides, designed for manual maneuvering or mechanical lifting.
description: A large, weathered gray metal dumpster with a flat, hinged lid, warning labels, and wheels for mobility. The exterior shows signs of rust, dents, and heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main access side with a closed, dented lid, warning labels, and visible wheels at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slanted metal flap, side handle, and the pronounced denting and wear on the lid and body.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the open slanted metal flap, with the lid partially lifted and the base less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side handle, more denting, and the overall boxy structure with the lid closed.
attribute_lid_type: Flat, hinged, two-section steel lid with one section propped open; no visible locking mechanism.
attribute_handle_design: Two bar-shaped steel handles, one on each side near the top edge.
